title: outline
summary: Outline is a knowledge base PRODUCT, not an extraction tool.  It teaches wiki page structure (hierarchy, collections, search, real-time collaboration, Markdown-native storage) but not how to extract FROM wikis.
creator_view: Outline is a knowledge base PRODUCT, not an extraction tool. It teaches wiki page structure (hierarchy, collections, search, real-time collaboration, Markdown-native storage) but not how to extract FROM wikis. Relevant for understanding what wiki content looks like structurally — nested documents, collections, permissions — which informs T28's wiki source type schema. TypeScript/React/Node.js.
creatorLens: Outline is a knowledge base PRODUCT, not an extraction tool. It teaches wiki page structure (hierarchy, collections, search, real-time collaboration, Markdown-native storage) but not how to extract FROM wikis. Relevant for understanding what wiki content looks like structurally — nested documents, collections, permissions — which informs T28's wiki source type schema. TypeScript/React/Node.js.

context.t28Relevance: Teaches wiki content STRUCTURE (what to expect when extracting from knowledge bases). Not an extraction tool itself.
notablePatterns: Document hierarchy: collections → documents → nested documents
Full-text search + API for programmatic access
